Comment: EventBridge rule to trigger CVE scan Lambda daily at 08:00 UTC

DeployInstructions.3_grant_invoke: aws lambda add-permission --function-name cve-auto-fix-agent --statement-id eventbridge-invoke --action lambda:InvokeFunction --principal events.amazonaws.com --source-arn arn:aws:events:<REGION>:<ACCOUNT_ID>:rule/cve-daily-scan
